title: PerodiumCraft: Old [Discontinued]
description: A new main resource appears in the game - Perodium.
body:
**A new main resource appears in the game - Perodium. It is possible to make super-tools and super-armor from it. It is not so easy to create a periodium. But you will be pleased with the result. And a new world is added.**
